tasks.label: check:all
tasks.command: ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m py_compile bot.py noodswap/*.py scripts/*.py tests/*.py && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python scripts/migration_smoke.py && ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'

tasks.label: git:rename-check
tasks.command: git status --short --find-renames && echo '---' && git diff --name-status -M -- . ':(exclude)noodswap/data/cards.json' | head -n 200

tasks.label: git:status-full
tasks.command: git status --short && echo '---' && git diff --name-only && echo '---' && git diff --cached --name-only

tasks.label: git:stage-unrelated
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json noodswap/fonts.py noodswap/frames.py noodswap/migrations.py noodswap/storage.py scripts/migration_smoke.py tests/test_commands.py tests/test_services.py tests/test_storage.py && git commit -m "chore: checkpoint unrelated local edits"

tasks.label: git:commit-migration
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m "refactor: split runtime state from versioned assets"
